description_long: This object is a single, curved sausage with a smooth, taut, and slightly glossy brown casing, typical of cooked or smoked sausages such as a bratwurst or frankfurter. The surface is uniform in color, with subtle natural wrinkling and a plump, cylindrical shape that tapers slightly at the ends. There are no visible grill marks, toppings, or branding, and the sausage appears uncut and whole. The casing has a semi-soft, resilient appearance, suggesting it is made from natural or synthetic sausage skin. The sausage is placed directly on a neutral, flat surface with no packaging or container visible. Its size and form are consistent with a standard street food sausage, suitable for handheld consumption.
description: A plump, curved brown sausage with a smooth, slightly glossy casing and no visible toppings or packaging. The surface is uniform and unmarked, suggesting it is freshly cooked or smoked.
description_view_0: The sausage appears curved and plump, with the rounded end and side curvature most visible.
description_view_1: The sausage is seen from the side, showing its full length and cylindrical shape with a slight taper at the ends.
description_view_2: The opposite curve of the sausage is visible, emphasizing its crescent shape and rounded end.
description_view_3: A straight-on side view, displaying the sausage's full length and even, smooth surface.
